title: Melothria cinerea
intro: Melothria cinerea, also known as the white melon coiled vine, is a species of flowering plant in the cucumber family, Cucurbitaceae. The health benefits of Melothria cinerea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for various health conditions. In herbal medicine, Melothria cinerea is often prepared as a juice, tea, or tincture, and is traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
